children.heading: Disclosure of information by health plan issuers
children.label: a Disclosure of information by health plan issuers

children.text: shall make a reasonable disclosure to such employer, or individual, as applicable,, as part of its solicitation and sales materials, of the availability of information described in subsection (b), and1So in original.1
upon request of such a employer, or individual, as applicable,, provide such information.2So in original. Probably should be “an”.21

children.label: A
children.text: the provisions of such coverage concerning issuer’s right to change premium rates and the factors that may affect changes in premium rates; and

children.label: B
children.text: the benefits and premiums available under all health insurance coverage for which the employer, or individual, as applicable, is qualified.

children.heading: Form of information
children.label: 2 Form of information
children.text: Information under this subsection shall be provided to employers, or individuals, as applicable, in a manner determined to be understandable by the average employer, or individual, as applicable,, and shall be sufficient to reasonably inform employers, or individuals, as applicable, of their rights and obligations under the health insurance coverage.1

children.heading: Exception
children.label: 3 Exception
children.text: An issuer is not required under this section to disclose any information that is proprietary and trade secret information under applicable law.
